author: kd9lsv
description: ESPHome is a system to control your microcontrollers by simple yet powerful configuration files and control them remotely through Home Automation systems.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- 2025.11.0 points to the official ESPHome changelog for this release.
- This app tracks the upstream ESPHome 2025.11.0 release.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- 2025.11.0 points to the official ESPHome changelog for this release.
